description_long: This bar features a compact, open-air structure with a wooden slatted roof and partial wooden slat walls, creating a semi-enclosed yet inviting environment. The front facade is adorned with three prominent black industrial-style lamps and a dark signboard, while the interior is visible and includes a central bar counter, high stools, and shelving for bottles. String lights are draped across the open sides, adding a festive ambiance, and the bar counter is equipped with a service area and shelving for glassware. The structure is supported by a combination of wood and metal framing, with the rear and side walls providing partial privacy through horizontal wooden slats. The overall design is modern with rustic and industrial influences, emphasizing both functionality and aesthetic appeal. No windows are present, and the entrance is a wide, open archway at the front, allowing easy access for patrons.
description: A modern, open-air bar with wooden slat walls, a slatted roof, industrial lighting, and a central counter with stools, blending rustic and industrial styles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance, central bar counter, stools, overhead lamps, and string lights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal wooden slats, partial privacy, and the edge of the bar counter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back wall and metal framing, with no visible entrance or windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slatted wall, string lights, and the side profile of the roof and lamps.
attribute_signage: A single dark rectangular signboard is mounted above the entrance, flanked by three black industrial-style lamps; no visible text or logos, and the signage is unlit.
attribute_entrance_type: Wide open archway with no doors, framed by wood and metal, providing direct access to the bar interior.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern rustic with industrial influences, characterized by exposed wood, metal framing, and open-air design.
